title: S2P-Net: A Spectral-Spatial Polar Network for Rotation-Invariant Object Recognition in Low-Data Regimes
abstract: arXiv:2605.09667v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: We present S2P-Net (Spectral-Spatial Polar Network), a compact deep learning architecture that achieves mathematically guaranteed rotation invariance without data augmentation. In this Paper, we also made a comparison to other neural network architectures (CNN`s). Have a look at the results and feel free to contact me for any questions. This is my first paper:) Made by Hackbert
context:
Title: S2P-Net: A Spectral-Spatial Polar Network for Rotation-Invariant Object Recognition in Low-Data Regimes
Abstract: arXiv:2605.09667v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: We present S2P-Net (Spectral-Spatial Polar Network), a compact deep learning architecture that achieves mathematically guaranteed rotation invariance without data augmentation. In this Paper, we also made a comparison to other neural network architectures (CNN`s). Have a look at the results and feel free to contact me for any questions. This is my first paper:) Made by Hackbert
translated_title: S2P-Net：一种用于低数据场景下旋转不变目标识别的光谱-空间极坐标网络
translated_abstract: 我们提出了S2P-Net（光谱-空间极坐标网络），这是一种紧凑的深度学习架构，无需数据增强即可实现数学上保证的旋转不变性。本文还与其他神经网络架构（如CNN）进行了比较。欢迎查看结果并随时联系我提出任何问题。这是我的第一篇论文:) 由Hackbert制作。
tldr: 提出了一种紧凑的深度学习架构S2P-Net，通过数学设计实现了无需数据增强的旋转不变性，适用于低数据场景下的目标识别。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes a compact deep learning architecture called S2P-Net, which achieves mathematically guaranteed rotation invariance without data augmentation for object recognition in low-data regimes.
